title: A Woman of the World
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, Pierre Collings, Carl Van Vechten
actors: Pola Negri, Charles Emmett Mack, Holmes Herbert
plot: A sensual European countess arrives at a small American town and quickly provokes moral outrage from the community. During her stay with a cousin, the temptress courts scandal smoking, enticing men, extravagant clothes and a tattoo.
